description: Approval binding for BEO-on-Beads. Only beo-validate may write PASS_EXECUTE; helper output verifies mechanics and hashes but never grants approval.
stale_when_changed: br issue description relevant to request/done
helper version when hash semantics change
current repo HEAD differs from approval_ref.repo_head
plan_input_hash_rule: This field hashes approval-bearing plan inputs only, including atomicity and verification commands through scope.verify.commands. It excludes assumptions, non_goals, triage_records, learning, recall, readiness, selected_execution_set, execution_mode, approval_ref, integrity, execution, review, debug, runtime_events, helper output refs, and other post-approval evidence so approval does not self-invalidate when later owners append evidence. Title, labels, assumptions, and non-goals are soft-drift fields and do not invalidate approval by themselves.
not_stale_when_changed: ordinary br comments that do not change scope, acceptance, risk, or authorization
issue title and labels unless they materially change request, scope, safety, or authorization
execute_entry_requires: approval_ref hashes match the current projection
approval_ref.repo_head matches the current repo HEAD or explicit no-vcs sentinel
br claim exists for current actor/session
prestate is captured before product mutation
helper_boundary: beo_check.py does not select execution sets
beo_check.py does not emit review verdicts
